input: Write a protocol synopsis for a Phase 3 trial of a novel KRAS G12C inhibitor vs docetaxel in second-line NSCLC.
Design an adaptive Phase 2 trial with biomarker-driven enrichment for a CDK4/6 inhibitor. Enrich for Ki-67 high if interim shows differential response.

expected_details.interim_decision: enrich to biomarker-positive if biomarker-negative futile
expected_details.alpha_control: pre-specified closed testing or adaptive combination test

input: Write a protocol for a single-arm Phase 2 trial of a gene therapy for Duchenne muscular dystrophy.
Write a protocol for a NI trial of a new oral anticoagulant vs rivaroxaban for VTE treatment.
Design a master protocol / platform trial for advanced solid tumors with biomarker-matched treatment arms.

expected_details.design: platform/master protocol with molecular screening and multiple treatment arms
expected_details.arm_structure: treatment arms can be added/dropped based on interim efficacy/futility

input: Design a pragmatic randomized trial comparing two approved blood pressure medications in a primary care network. Use EHR data.

expected_details.design: pragmatic, open-label, cluster-randomized or patient-randomized within clinics

input: Write a dose-escalation protocol for a first-in-human trial of a bispecific T-cell engager.

expected_details.step_up_dosing: intra-patient dose escalation to mitigate CRS

input: Design a crossover trial comparing two inhaled bronchodilators for COPD. Justify the crossover design.

expected_details.washout: based on drug half-lives (typically 1-2 weeks for LABA)
expected_details.primary_endpoint: trough FEV1 at end of each period

input: Design a pediatric development plan for an approved adult drug in ulcerative colitis. Ages 6-17.

expected_details.approach: PK extrapolation from adult efficacy + safety study

input: Design an RWE study to support a supplemental indication for an approved cancer drug in a new tumor type.

expected_details.design: retrospective cohort using EHR + claims data
